full_text:
Cheng Yi 成宜
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Yi (成宜). One of Han Sui’s Eight Knights. Attacked Chang’an with Ma Chao. Killed by Xiahou Yuan. Cheng Yi was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty. Cheng Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
